revision.comment: 記述を手直し
revision.text:
# [[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]にある[[椿大神社]]の通称。 # 椿神社。[[サルタヒコ|猿田彦神]]を祭る神社で全国にあるが、上記の椿大神社から勧請されたものは少ない。 # [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]にある[[伊豫豆比古命神社]]の別名。上記の神社とは関係ない。
{{aimai}}

revision.comment: 体裁変更
revision.text:
'''椿神社'''（つばきじんじゃ）は[[神社]]。
*椿神社 - [[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]鎮座の椿大神社の通称 ⇒ [[椿大神社]] **椿神社 - [[サルタヒコ|猿田彦神]]を祭る神社で全国にあるが、上記の椿大神社から勧請されたものは少ない。 *椿神社 - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]鎮座の伊豫豆比古命神社の別名 ⇒ [[伊豫豆比古命神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:つはきしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: 内容追加
revision.text:
'''椿神社'''（つばきじんじゃ）は全国各地にある[[神社]]。
*椿神社 - [[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]鎮座の椿大神社の通称 ⇒ [[椿大神社]] **椿神社 - [[サルタヒコ|猿田彦神]]を祭る神社で全国にあるが、上記の椿大神社から勧請されたものは少ない。 *椿神社 - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]鎮座の伊豫豆比古命神社の別名 ⇒ [[伊豫豆比古命神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:つはきしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''椿神社'''（つばきじんじゃ）は全国各地にある[[神社]]。
* [[椿神社 (大田区)]] - [[東京都]][[大田区]]にある神社。 * 椿神社 - [[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]鎮座の椿大神社の通称 ⇒ [[椿大神社]] ** 椿神社 - [[サルタヒコ|猿田彦神]]を祭る神社で全国にあるが、上記の椿大神社から勧請されたものは少ない。 * 椿神社 - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]鎮座の伊豫豆比古命神社の別名 ⇒ [[伊豫豆比古命神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:つはきしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

'''椿神社'''（つばきじんじゃ）は全国各地にある[[神社]]。
* [[椿神社 (大田区)]] - [[東京都]][[大田区]]にある神社。 * 椿神社 - [[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]鎮座の椿大神社の通称 ⇒ [[椿大神社]] ** 椿神社 - [[サルタヒコ|猿田彦神]]を祭る神社で全国にあるが、上記の椿大神社から勧請されたものは少ない。 * 椿神社 - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]鎮座の伊豫豆比古命神社の別名 ⇒ [[伊豫豆比古命神社]]

'''Tsubaki Shrine''' (椿神社) refers to various [[Shinto shrine]]s across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|en|椿神社 (大田区)}} - A shrine located in [[Ōta]], [[Tokyo]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for {{ill|Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro|en|椿大神社}} in [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko|en|猿田彦神}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozu Hiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|en|伊豫豆比古命神社}} in [[Matsuyama]], [[Ehime Prefecture]].
{{Disambiguation}} [[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[ja:椿神社]]
[[Category:shinto shrines with the same name]][[ja:椿神社]][[category:kk]]

revision.text:
'''Tsubaki Shrine''' (椿神社) refers to various [[Shinto shrine]]s across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|ja|椿神社 (大田区)}} - A shrine located in [[Ōta]], [[Tokyo]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for {{ill|Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro|ja|椿大神社}} in [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦神}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozu Hiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|伊豫豆比古命神社}} in [[Matsuyama]], [[Ehime Prefecture]].
{{Disambiguation}} [[ja:椿神社]]
[[Category:Shrines with identical names]] [[Category:kk]][[simple:user:immanuelle/Tsubaki Shrine (disambiguation)]][[category:kk]] [[Category:Original pages]]<!--note do not remove this category during translation-->[[Category:original pages]] [[Category:original pages]] [[simple:user:immanuelle/Tsubaki Shrine (disambiguation)]][[en:draft:Tsubaki Shrine (disambiguation)]][[ja:椿神社]][[Category:refresh]] [[Category:dd]][[Category:Tsubaki Shrine (disambiguation)]][[Category:dd]] [[Category:mass bump]] [[Category:Images]]

revision.text:
'''Tsubaki Shrine''' (椿神社) refers to various [[Shinto shrines]][[Category:shrine disambiguations]]s across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|ja|椿神社 (大田区)}} - A shrine located in [[Ōta]], [[Tokyo]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社}} in [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]]. ** Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦神}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|伊豫豆比古命神社}} in [[Matsuyama]], [[Ehime Prefecture]].
{{Disambiguation}} [[ja:椿神社]][[Category:Shrine disambiguations]]

* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|ja|椿神社 (大田区)|12=draft}} - A shrine located in [[Ōta]], [[Tokyo]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|ja|椿大神社|12=draft}} in [[Suzuka]], [[Mie Prefecture]]. ** Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦神|12=draft}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|伊豫豆比古命神社|12=draft}} in [[Matsuyama]], [[Ehime Prefecture]].
{{Disambiguation}}
[[simple:user:immanuelle/Tsubaki Shrines]]

9 revisions imported: Bot: import full history from ja:椿神社 up to rev 77423926
revision.text:
'''椿神社'''（つばきじんじゃ）は全国各地にある[[神社]]。
* [[椿神社 (大田区)]] - [[東京都]][[大田区]]にある神社。 * 椿神社 - [[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]鎮座の椿大神社の通称 ⇒ [[椿大神社]] ** 椿神社 - [[サルタヒコ|猿田彦神]]を祭る神社で全国にあるが、上記の椿大神社から勧請されたものは少ない。 * 椿神社 - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]鎮座の伊豫豆比古命神社の別名 ⇒ [[伊豫豆比古命神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:つはきしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[椿神社]] to [[Tsubaki Shrine (disambiguation)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import
revision.text:
'''椿神社'''（つばきじんじゃ）は全国各地にある[[神社]]。
* [[椿神社 (大田区)]] - [[東京都]][[大田区]]にある神社。 * 椿神社 - [[三重県]][[鈴鹿市]]鎮座の椿大神社の通称 ⇒ [[椿大神社]] ** 椿神社 - [[サルタヒコ|猿田彦神]]を祭る神社で全国にあるが、上記の椿大神社から勧請されたものは少ない。 * 椿神社 - [[愛媛県]][[松山市]]鎮座の伊豫豆比古命神社の別名 ⇒ [[伊豫豆比古命神社]]
{{曖昧さ回避}} {{デフォルトソート:つはきしんしや}} [[Category:同名の神社]]

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:椿神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11541039]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tsubaki Shrine''' (椿神社) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|ja|椿神社 (大田区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|qq=}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Ōta|Ōta]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka|Suzuka]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]. ** Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サルタヒコ}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|伊豫豆比古命神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Matsuyama|Matsuyama]], [[:en:Ehime Prefecture|Ehime Prefecture]].
{{Disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|椿神社|version=77423926|comment=Imported full ja history}}
{{draft categories| [[Category:shrine disambiguations]] [[Category:Shrine disambiguations]]
[[Category:All disambiguation pages]]
}}

* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|ja|椿神社 (大田区)|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|qq=}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Ōta|Ōta]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka|Suzuka]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]. ** Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦神|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サルタヒコ}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|伊豫豆比古命神社|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Matsuyama|Matsuyama]], [[:en:Ehime Prefecture|Ehime Prefecture]].

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:椿神社]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[Category:Has wikidata]][[d:Q11541039]] Wikidata name: [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 10:04, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} '''Tsubaki Shrine''' (椿神社) refers to various [[:en:Shinto shrine|Shinto shrine]]s across Japan.
* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|ja|椿神社 (大田区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|qq=}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Ōta|Ōta]], [[:en:Tokyo|Tokyo]]. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for [[:en:Tsubaki Grand Shrine|Tsubaki Grand Shrine]] in [[:en:Suzuka|Suzuka]], [[:en:Mie Prefecture|Mie Prefecture]]. ** Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サルタヒコ}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|伊豫豆比古命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}} in [[:en:Matsuyama|Matsuyama]], [[:en:Ehime Prefecture|Ehime Prefecture]].
{{disambiguation}}[[Category:Short pages to be excluded since they are disambiguations]]
{{translated page|ja|椿神社|version=77423926|comment=Imported full ja history}}

* {{ill|Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|ja|椿神社 (大田区)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsubaki Shrine (Ōta)|qq=}} - A shrine located in [[:en:Ōta|Ōta]], {{ill|Tokyo|en|Tokyo|WD=Q1490|lt=Tokyo}}. * Tsubaki Shrine - A common name for {{ill|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|en|Tsubaki Grand Shrine|WD=Q3541617|lt=Tsubaki Grand Shrine}} in {{ill|Suzuka|en|Suzuka|WD=Q406474|lt=Suzuka}}, {{ill|Mie Prefecture|en|Mie Prefecture|WD=Q128196|lt=Mie Prefecture}}. ** Tsubaki Shrine - Shrines dedicated to {{ill|Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko Ōkami|lt=Sarutahiko|ja|猿田彦神|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarutahiko|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to サルタヒコ}} across Japan, though few are directly related to the Tsubaki Ōkami Yashiro. * Tsubaki Shrine - An alternate name for {{ill|Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|ja|伊豫豆比古命神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Iyozuhiko-no-Mikoto Shrine|qq=}} in {{ill|Matsuyama|en|Matsuyama|WD=Q200022|lt=Matsuyama}}, {{ill|Ehime Prefecture|en|Ehime Prefecture|WD=Q123376|lt=Ehime Prefecture}}.
{{disambiguation}}
{{translated page|ja|椿神社|version=77423926|comment=Imported full ja history}}
